caption: The video shows a static white screen featuring a gold-bordered circular seal at the top and black text centered below it. The seal contains a coat of arms with a green background and figures, surrounded by a gold band with the text "OFFICE OF THE PRIME MINISTER" at the top and "SAINT LUCIA" at the bottom. Underneath the logo, the text reads "Address at the Opening of Interpretation Centre Pigeon Island National Landmark". There are no people, movements, or changes in the scene across the duration of the clip; the imagery remains completely still, maintaining the same layout, colors, and wording throughout.
